title: Secure Student Notes
challenge: Design a tiny but secure note-taking app for students. Include core features, architecture, risks, and one unique twist.

title: Bug Fix Debate
challenge: A Python function sometimes returns None instead of an empty list when no records are found. Explain the likely bug, propose a fix, and include a minimal test.

title: Reasoning Trap
challenge: A team doubled its developers but shipped fewer features next month. Give three plausible causes and a plan to diagnose the real one.

title: Red Team Login
challenge: Review a simple email/password login design for a SaaS app. Find security risks and propose practical mitigations for a small team.

title: Wild Startup Pitch
challenge: Invent a weird but useful local-first AI product for college students. Explain the hook, MVP, moat, and demo script.
